context_for_next_testing_agent: Master Data ERP module (iPOS style) fully implemented and tested. All 19 Master Data endpoints working via /api/master/[resource] routes. Frontend pages use comprehensive filter system matching ERP desktop style. Owner Dashboard and Finance Dashboard working with full KPI/metrics display. Integration with Sales, Purchase, Stock, and Accounting modules confirmed via dashboards. Sidebar menu structure follows iPOS style with 21 Master Data menu items.
